subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the Fragrances of God! As to thy question, If the husband preventeth his wife from entering into the Light... The darkness spoken of in the Bible
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المنجذب بنفحات الله قد اخذت تحریرک المورخ اول آب سنه ۱۹۰۱ و اطلعت
subcodes.subjects: @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @marriage as means of spiritual progress, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @nonexistence of evil; relativity of good and evil
